description: A precision agriculture consultant needs to identify high-vigor crop areas using an RGB True Color Image (Sentinel-2 TCI) located at ~/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif. The image bands are mapped as: band_1 = Red, band_2 = Green, band_3 = Blue. Create three new virtual bands: 'VARI' using the formula (Green - Red) / (Green + Red - Blue), 'NGRDI' using the formula (Green - Red) / (Green + Red), and a binary mask 'high_vigor_mask' where VARI > 0.15 AND NGRDI > 0.05. Save the resulting product containing all bands in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_projects/rgb_vigor.dim and export it in ENVI format to ~/snap_exports/rgb_vigor_envi.
